languages.text: "Функции жизнеформы "Мартинакс" восстановлены. Критические потери крови были быстро восполнены множеством пришедших на экстренную сдачу жизнеформ более низкого статуса с нижних палуб. Предположение: чернь сделала это из преданности конкретному медикарию. Жизнеформа "Мартинакс" также желает поблагодарить вас"

"The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."
languages.original_text: "Функции жизнеформы "Мартинакс" восстановлены. Предположение: чернь сделала это из преданности конкретному медикарию. Жизнеформа "Мартинакс" также желает поблагодарить вас"

languages.text: «Las funciones vitales de la forma de vida "Martinax" han sido restauradas. La pérdida crítica de sangre fue remediada rápidamente mediante numerosos sujetos de estatus inferior que se prestaron a donar urgentemente. Suposición: la chusma lo hizo por lealtad hacia ese oficial de medicae concreto. La forma de vida "Martinax" también quiere transmitirle su agradecimiento».
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."

languages.text: “‘马丁纳克斯’生命体的机能已恢复。由于众多来自下层甲板的低等生命体主动前来紧急献血，严重的失血得以快速补足。推测：这些贱民这么做是出于对该医务官的忠诚。‘马丁纳克斯’生命体也希望向您致谢。”
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."

traits.locale_text: “‘马丁纳克斯’生命体的机能已恢复。由于众多来自下层甲板的低等生命体主动前来紧急献血，严重的失血得以快速补足。推测：这些贱民这么做是出于对该医务官的忠诚。‘马丁纳克斯’生命体也希望向您致谢。”

languages.text: « Les fonctions vitales de l'entité "Martinax" ont été restaurées. L'hémorragie critique dont elle a été victime a été rapidement compensée par les nombreuses entités subalternes des ponts inférieurs qui se sont portées volontaires pour donner leur sang dans l'urgence. Hypothèse : la populace a agi par la loyauté envers ledit officier de medicae. L'entité "Martinax" tient elle aussi à vous remercier. »
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."

languages.text: "'Martinax' yaşam formunun fonksiyonları geri yüklendi. Kritik kan kaybı, acil kan alma işlemi için kendilerini sunan alt güvertelerden çok sayıda düşük statülü yaşam formunca hızla takviye edildi. Ayaktakımının bunu, ilgili sıhhiye subayına olan sadakatlerinden dolayı yaptığı varsayılmakta. 'Martinax' yaşam formu da size teşekkür etmek istiyor."
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."

Kritik kan kaybı, acil kan alma işlemi için kendilerini sunan alt güvertelerden çok sayıda düşük statülü yaşam formunca hızla takviye edildi. languages.text: 「生命体「マーティナックス」の機能が回復しました。重大な出血は、下甲板の多数の低位生命体から緊急の採血によって迅速に補給されました。推測：その特定の医療官への忠誠心から、群衆はそうしたのです。生命体「マーティナックス」も感謝の意を表します。」
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Critical blood loss was quickly replenished by the multitude of lesser-status life forms from the lower decks who presented themselves for urgent blood-letting. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."

traits.locale_text: 「生命体「マーティナックス」の機能が回復しました。重大な出血は、下甲板の多数の低位生命体から緊急の採血によって迅速に補給されました。推測：その特定の医療官への忠誠心から、群衆はそうしたのです。生命体「マーティナックス」も感謝の意を表します。」

languages.text: "Die Funktionen der Lebensform 'Martinax' wurden wiederhergestellt. Der kritische Blutverlust konnte durch eine Vielzahl minderwertigerer Lebensformen von den unteren Decks kompensiert werden, die sich als Blutspender zur Verfügung stellten. Vermutung: Ursächlich war Loyalität gegenüber diesem speziellen Medicae-Offizier. Die Lebensform 'Martinax' möchte Euch überdies danken."
languages.original_text: "The functions of the life form 'Martinax' have been restored. Supposition: the rabble did this out of loyalty to that particular medicae officer. The life form 'Martinax' also wishes to thank you."
